productDisplayName: Puma Men Ferrari Red Polo T-shirt
description: Composition Red polo T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, ribbed collar, fabric tape detailing on the in-seam of the neckline, buttoned chest placket, graphic print vertically across the left side with a ferrari logo, logo appliquéd on the right sleeve and embroidered on the left sleeve, mesh panels on either sides and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in cool water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Run those marathons with ease in this ultra-comfortable cotton T-shirt from puma. Designed to wick sweat away and keep you fresh and comfortable all day, this tee looks great with shorts or jeans and sports shoes. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
